name: Platform
description: Cross-cutting configuration shared across all services

settings.label: Data Directory
settings.description: Root directory for all app data (media, logs, cache, settings). Leave empty for OS default.

settings.label: Use Local Datastores
settings.description: Skip Docker DB service; use local Postgres/Redis instead

settings.label: Health Check Interval
settings.description: Base polling interval in seconds. Lower = more responsive, higher = less CPU/log noise.

settings.label: Health Check Timeout
settings.description: HTTP timeout per /health request. Raise if backend is slow under DB load (causes flapping).

settings.label: Log Exclude Paths
settings.description: Comma-separated HTTP paths dropped from request logs. Default silences routine health-check polling.

settings.label: Environment
settings.description: Deployment environment: development, staging, or production. Gates environment-scoped middleware.

settings.label: Anthropic API Key
settings.description: Injected as ANTHROPIC_API_KEY into all services. Stored locally in plaintext; leave empty to fall back to .env / OS env.

settings.label: OpenAI API Key
settings.description: Injected as OPENAI_API_KEY into all services. Stored locally in plaintext; leave empty to fall back to .env / OS env.
